title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at PwC India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at PwC India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
PwC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About PwC India:
PwC India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PwC India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
